basic_details.job_title: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - 312 Vacancies, Apply Online from 30 July 2026
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA), Hamirpur
basic_details.short_information: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026: The Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA), Hamirpur has released the HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 notification for 312 vacancies of Assistant Staff Nurse (Post Code 26044) under the Director, Medical Education & Research, Himachal Pradesh. The recruitment is offered on a purely engagement basis for five years with a fixed monthly honorarium of Rs. 25,000/-.

important_dates.correction_date: Four days, commencing after the closing date, subject to payment of the prescribed correction fee
important_dates.computer based test (cbt) date: Not specified in the notification; will be notified separately by HPRCA
important_dates.admit_card_date: Not specified; candidates must download from hprca.hp.gov.in when notified

application_fee.details: The fee can be paid only through the Online Payment Gateway using Credit Card, Debit Card, or Net Banking. No other mode of payment is accepted. Examination and processing fees, once paid, are neither refundable nor held in reserve for any other examination or selection.

age_limit.age_details: Purely on engagement basis for five (5) years; consolidated fixed monthly honorarium

qualification.details: Candidates must possess one of the following essential qualifications from a recognized University/Institution: | B.Sc. Nursing with 50% marks, or GNM (A Grade Nursing Diploma) with 50% marks

vacancy_details.No. of Posts: 312 (Gen-UR: 112, EWS: 40, Gen-WFF: 04, OBC-UR: 50, OBC-BPL: 12, OBC-WFF: 02, SC-UR: 62, SC-BPL: 12, SC-WFF: 02, ST-UR: 12, ST-BPL: 04)

post_wise_breakdown.no_of_posts: 312 (Gen-UR: 112, EWS: 40, Gen-WFF: 04, OBC-UR: 50, OBC-BPL: 12, OBC-WFF: 02, SC-UR: 62, SC-BPL: 12, SC-WFF: 02, ST-UR: 12, ST-BPL: 04)

category_wise_vacancy.No. of Posts: 312 (Gen-UR: 112, EWS: 40, Gen-WFF: 04, OBC-UR: 50, OBC-BPL: 12, OBC-WFF: 02, SC-UR: 62, SC-BPL: 12, SC-WFF: 02, ST-UR: 12, ST-BPL: 04)

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be engaged on a fixed monthly consolidated honorarium of Rs. 25,000/- for a period of five (5) years. The engagement is purely temporary; the Assistant Staff Nurse (ASN) will not be a Government employee and shall have no right to regularization/engagement against the posts of Staff Nurse or any similar designation in the State of HP. The competent authority may, on a need basis, enhance the engagement period in the larger public interest. As per the governing policy, the State Government may, by notification, enhance the fixed honorarium considering various factors as it may deem fit.

how_to_apply: Sign Up: Register on the HPRCA portal (hprca.hp.gov.in) by clicking the "Sign Up" option to create a username and password.

One-Time Registration (OTR): Complete OTR by providing personal information, educational qualifications, work experience (if any), a recent photograph and signature, and relevant supporting documents.
Complete/Update Profile: Only candidates with a completed profile can apply for posts.
Apply for the Post: View the list of available posts under different categories on the HPRCA portal and click "Apply" against the desired post.
Select Preferred Exam District: Choose preferred district(s) for the examination from the dropdown menu (subject to availability of choice centre/computer nodes).
Confirm Application Details: Review the auto-filled application form based on the OTR profile before proceeding.
Pay Application Fee: Complete payment of Rs. 800/- through the available online payment gateway.
Application Submission Confirmation: After successful payment, the application will be considered complete. Download and keep a printed copy of the application form.
important_instructions: Candidates holding a B.Sc. Nursing or GNM qualification can also explore more Nursing Government Jobs and Staff Nurse Recruitment notifications published across India. Applicants interested in more opportunities within the state can check the latest Himachal Pradesh Government Jobs and HPRCA Recruitment 2026 notifications. Female candidates looking for similar engagement-based openings can also browse Medical Education Department Jobs and HPNRC Registered Nurse Vacancies matching their qualification.

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.details: Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA), Hamirpur
Purely on engagement basis for five (5) years; consolidated fixed monthly honorarium
Online only (ORA); no offline application form accepted
Computer Based Test (CBT)/written screening test of 120 marks

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 312 Assistant Staff Nurse posts (Post Code 26044) have been advertised under the Director, Medical Education & Research, HP. The Aayog has clarified that the number of posts is tentative and may increase or decrease as per requisitions received.

rows.no_of_posts: 312 (Gen-UR: 112, EWS: 40, Gen-WFF: 04, OBC-UR: 50, OBC-BPL: 12, OBC-WFF: 02, SC-UR: 62, SC-BPL: 12, SC-WFF: 02, ST-UR: 12, ST-BPL: 04)

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Applicant must be a female candidate only . Applicant must be a Himachali Bonafide . Applicant must be registered with HPNRC, Shimla-06 (Himachal Pradesh Nurses Registration Council). The candidate must have passed Matriculation and 10+2 from a school/institution situated within Himachal Pradesh. This condition does not apply to Bonafide Himachalis.

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Educational Qualification 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must possess one of the following essential qualifications from a recognized University/Institution: B.Sc. Nursing with 50% marks, or GNM (A Grade Nursing Diploma) with 50% marks

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Salary/Honorarium 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be engaged on a fixed monthly consolidated honorarium of Rs. 25,000/- for a period of five (5) years. The engagement is purely temporary; the Assistant Staff Nurse (ASN) will not be a Government employee and shall have no right to regularization/engagement against the posts of Staff Nurse or any similar designation in the State of HP. The competent authority may, on a need basis, enhance the engagement period in the larger public interest. As per the governing policy, the State Government may, by notification, enhance the fixed honorarium considering various factors as it may deem fit.

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: The fee can be paid only through the Online Payment Gateway using Credit Card, Debit Card, or Net Banking. No other mode of payment is accepted. Examination and processing fees, once paid, are neither refundable nor held in reserve for any other examination or selection.

rows.category: All Categories (Rs. 100/- examination fee + Rs. 700/- processing fee)
Correction Fee (during the four-day correction window)

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Required Documents 2026
content_sections.text: Copies of only the following documents/certificates are to be uploaded in support of claims made in the Online Recruitment Application (ORA), and must also be produced/provided at the time of document verification: Matriculation certificate for age proof Degree/Diploma certificate(s), along with mark sheets of all years, in support of educational qualification (B.Sc. Nursing/GNM) as prescribed under the Essential Qualification column; provisional certificate(s) along with mark sheets of all semesters/years, if applicable Experience certificate(s), wherever required (post-qualification experience only, duly verified/countersigned by the concerned Government Authority/Departmental Officer) Caste certificate, if applicable BPL certificate, if applicable Any other certificates required for determining eligibility as mentioned under the mode of selection criteria, wherever applicable Scanned passport-size photograph (not older than 1 month), JPG/JPEG/PNG format, maximum 1 MB Scanned signature, JPG/JPEG/PNG format, maximum 1 MB All certificates required in support of eligibility, category claims, and experience must be in the prescribed format, failing which the candidature is liable to be rejected.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Sign Up: Register on the HPRCA portal (hprca.hp.gov.in) by clicking the "Sign Up" option to create a username and password. One-Time Registration (OTR): Complete OTR by providing personal information, educational qualifications, work experience (if any), a recent photograph and signature, and relevant supporting documents. Complete/Update Profile: Only candidates with a completed profile can apply for posts. Apply for the Post: View the list of available posts under different categories on the HPRCA portal and click "Apply" against the desired post. Select Preferred Exam District: Choose preferred district(s) for the examination from the dropdown menu (subject to availability of choice centre/computer nodes). Confirm Application Details: Review the auto-filled application form based on the OTR profile before proceeding. Pay Application Fee: Complete payment of Rs. 800/- through the available online payment gateway. Application Submission Confirmation: After successful payment, the application will be considered complete. Download and keep a printed copy of the application form.

content_sections.heading: HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates holding a B.Sc. Nursing or GNM qualification can also explore more Nursing Government Jobs and Staff Nurse Recruitment notifications published across India. Applicants interested in more opportunities within the state can check the latest Himachal Pradesh Government Jobs and HPRCA Recruitment 2026 notifications. Female candidates looking for similar engagement-based openings can also browse Medical Education Department Jobs and HPNRC Registered Nurse Vacancies matching their qualification.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 312 Assistant Staff Nurse (ASN) posts have been advertised by HPRCA under Advertisement No. 12/2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the Online Recruitment Application (ORA) is 29.08.2026, till 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q3. Who can apply for the HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: Only female candidates who are Himachali Bonafide, registered with HPNRC Shimla-06, and hold a B.Sc. Nursing (50% marks) or GNM (A Grade Nursing Diploma, 50% marks) from a recognized University/Institution can apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the advertisement, the age limit is 21 to 45 years, reckoned as on 01.01.2026, with age relaxation up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/HP Government employees and Ex-servicemen of Himachal Pradesh, as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary/honorarium for HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed monthly consolidated honorarium of Rs. 25,000/- for an engagement period of five (5) years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The total application fee for all categories is Rs. 800/- (Rs. 100/- examination fee + Rs. 700/- processing fee), payable online only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Computer Based Test (CBT)/written screening test of 120 marks (120 MCQs, 1 mark each) of 1½ hours duration, covering the essential qualification syllabus, General Knowledge, Current Affairs, Everyday Science, Logical Reasoning, Social Science, and General English & Hindi of Matric standard.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. The Assistant Staff Nurse engagement is purely on an engagement basis for five (5) years with a fixed honorarium. The Aayog notification and the governing policy clearly state that the ASN will not be a Government employee and has no right to regularization against any sanctioned post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the HPRCA Assistant Staff Nurse admit card?
faq.answer: No admit card will be sent by post. Provisionally admitted candidates must download their admit card from hprca.hp.gov.in using Application ID, Name, and Date of Birth, along with an OTP sent to their registered mobile number/email.
